sections.sectionTitle: Pasian in A Mi Vakvaite It Veve

verses.text: Israel a neu lai-in ka it mahmah a, Egypt gam panin ka tapa ka samkhia hi
Ahi zongin limsap semsem leng gamla pai semsem hi. Ka mite in Baal tungah biakna pia uh a, milim biakna-in paknamtui a hal uh hi
Ahi zongin Israel mite lam a paitheihna ding a hilhpa keimah ka hi a, ka ang sungah amaute ka tawi hi. Ahi zongin amaute ka don lamtak phawkkhalo uh hi
Amaute, itna leh hehpihna tawh ka len a, domto-in ka biang ciangah ka tawi a, awn sukin an ka pia hi
Tua bang hinapi, kei lamah amaute hong kihei nuamlo uh ahih manin Egypt gamah paikik ding uh a, Assiria mite, amau' kumpi hi ding hi
Galte in a khuapi sung uh luhin, a khuapi kulhkongpi zawlte uh suktansak ding hi. Ka mite in thu hoihlo zuikha uh ahih manin gal in susiamang ding hi
Ka mite in kei kiang panin pial ding ngaihsun tawntung uh ahih manin amaute in kolbulhna thuak ding uh a, kuamah in a kol sutsaklo ding hi

Israel mite aw, bangci-a hong nusia thei ding a, bangci-a hong paidak thei ding ka hi hiam? Admah khua ka suksiat bangin kong susia nuam kei a, Zeboiim khua ka bawl bangin kong bawl nuam kei hi. Note hong khasiat mahmah ka hih manin tua banga hih ding ka lungsimah omlo hi

Ka heh manin gim kong pia kei ding a, no Israel-te kong susia kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah, mihing hiloin, Pasian ka hi hi. Kei a Siangtho Pa, note tawh kong omkhawm a, a hehsa-in note kiangah kong pai kei ding hi
Humpinelkai bangin a galte uh ka hawksan gawp ding a, tua ciangin ka mite in kei hong zui ding uh hi. Nitumna lam gam panin kei kiangah hong nawhtai ding uh hi
Egypt gam panin vasa bangin lawptakin hong leeng ding uh a, Assiria gam panin vakhu bangin hong leeng ding uh hi. Tua ciangin keimah in amaute' inn ngeisa-ah ka tun'pih kik ding hi, Topa in ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Zuauna leh Mi Netniamna Israel Kitai

verses.text: Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Israel mite in zuauna leh khemna bekbek tawh kei hong khuhcip uh hi. Judah mite in zong a citak a Siangtho Pa keimah hong langpang lai uh hi.
